ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the test record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the tests were conducted */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test facility where the tests were conducted */,
  "pcr_tests" INTEGER /* Number of PCR tests conducted */,
  "pcr_pos_tests" INTEGER /* Number of positive PCR tests */,
  "pcr_positivity" REAL /* Positivity rate for PCR tests */,
  "ser_tests" INTEGER /* Number of serological tests conducted */,
  "ser_pos_tests" INTEGER /* Number of positive serological tests */,
  "ser_positivity" REAL /* Positivity rate for serological tests */,
  "total_tests" INTEGER /* Total number of tests conducted */,
  "positive_tests" INTEGER /* Total number of positive tests */,
  "test_coverage" REAL /* Percentage of the population that has been tested */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* Name of the person or system that reported the data */,
  "reported_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_records_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_records_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES test_facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the county */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the county's data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the county's data was first entered */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the county is currently active in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the test type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test type */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* Average duration of the test (in minutes) */,
  "test_sensitivity" REAL /* Sensitivity of the test (percentage) */,
  "test_specificity" REAL /* Specificity of the test (percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the test facility */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the facility is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the test facility */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the test facility */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of the facility (e.g., hospital, clinic, mobile unit) */,
  "operational_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the facility */,
  "last_inspected_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last inspection of the facility */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Name of the inspector who last inspected the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test record */,
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test type */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test facility */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date of the test */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test (positive, negative) */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient who took the test */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test (in minutes) */,
  "test_kit" TEXT /* Type of test kit used */,
  "result_confirmed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the result was confirmed */,
  "result_confirmed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who confirmed the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES test_facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_type_id") REFERENCES test_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES test_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positivity_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each positivity rate record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test type */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the positivity rate */,
  "positivity_rate" REAL /* Positivity rate for the given date */,
  "total_tests" INTEGER /* Total number of tests conducted */,
  "positive_tests" INTEGER /* Number of positive tests */,
  "test_coverage" REAL /* Percentage of the population that has been tested */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positivity_rates_test_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_type_id") REFERENCES test_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positivity_rates_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_volumes" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test volume record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test type */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the test volume */,
  "total_tests" INTEGER /* Total number of tests conducted */,
  "positive_tests" INTEGER /* Number of positive tests */,
  "test_coverage" REAL /* Percentage of the population that has been tested */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_volumes_test_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_type_id") REFERENCES test_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_volumes_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_password_change_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last password change */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the test record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the test record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES test_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, HTML) */,
  "date_generated" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who generated the report */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the report */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
